scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const {execFileSync}=require('child_process');const skip=new Set(['node_modules','.git']);function walk(dir){for(const entry of fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true})){if(skip.has(entry.name))continue;const full=path.join(dir,entry.name);if(entry.isDirectory())walk(full);else if(full.endsWith('.js'))execFileSync(process.execPath,['--check',full],{stdio:'inherit'});}}walk('.');console.log('Backend syntax test passed');"
